message:
Fix local card filters to not be overridden by global filters

- Remove behavior that cleared local filters when global filter changed
- Add localStorage persistence for local cluster filters
- Add storageKey option to FilterConfig for persisting filters
- Local filters now remain intact when global filter is applied/cleared
- Compute activeLocalFilter to track which local selections are still valid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
